name: ourairports-mcp-server
description: Resolve airport codes (IATA/ICAO/GPS/local), search airports, find the nearest by coordinate, and look up runways, navaids, and radio frequencies from the bundled public-domain OurAirports dataset via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

interface.shortDescription: Resolve airport codes (IATA/ICAO/GPS/local), search airports, find the nearest by coordinate, and look up runways, navaids, and radio frequencies from the bundled public-domain OurAirports dataset via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.
interface.longDescription: Static, offline aviation reference data from the public-domain OurAirports dataset — airports, runways, navaids, and radio frequencies. The dataset is bundled into the package and served from in-memory indices built at startup, so every tool is a local query with no API key, no rate limit, and no upstream dependency. Resolves any airport by a single code across IATA/ICAO/GPS/local/ident, ranks airports nearest-first to a coordinate by great-circle distance, and surfaces runways, navaids, and frequencies. Community-edited data — not authoritative for real flight operations.
